message:
fix(channel): remove ChangedFuture waiter from watch queue on drop

When a ChangedFuture was dropped while still pending (e.g. via
select! or cancellation), the WatchWaiter entry remained in the inner
waiters list indefinitely. This caused two problems: the Arc reference
kept the waiter alive (memory leak), and subsequent notify cycles would
attempt to wake a dead waker (spurious wakeups to nowhere). The new
Drop impl removes the waiter by ID from the waiters list, matching the
pattern already used in broadcast and mpsc channels.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
